product_title: Culture Pop Soda, Pink Grapefruit & Ginger, Probiotic Low Sugar Soda, Sparkling Juice Alternative, Non-GMO, Kosher, Gluten-Free, No Stevia (Multipack, 12ct, 144 fl oz)

reviews.title: Life-Changing in a Can – Thank You, Culture Pop!
reviews.body: Where do I even begin? I’m honestly emotional writing this, because this little can of soda has changed my life. For years, I’ve struggled with irregular and painful bathroom habits - bloating, discomfort, the whole frustrating cycle. Despite my best efforts with a healthy lifestyle and countless probiotics (seriously, I’ve tried it all - daily probiotic supplements, kombucha, GoodBelly shots, yogurt drinks…), nothing made a lasting difference. I eat clean—organic fruits and veggies, salads, sweet potatoes, fish, chicken, grass-fed beef—and I even make my own sourdough from a starter! I’ve been diligent, and still, my gut just hasn’t cooperated. Then, two weeks ago, I tried Culture Pop. One can a day. That’s it. And for the past 14 days, I’ve been having soft, comfortable, pain-free bathroom visits every single morning, around 8am like clockwork. I’m in an emotional disbelief after every bathroom visit now. It sounds silly, but if you’ve been in my shoes, you know how huge this is. Here’s what I think makes the difference… Culture Pop contains Bacillus subtilis, a probiotic strain I’d never encountered in any other supplement or drink I’ve tried. And now I’m convinced my body was missing this all along. Whatever the magic is, my gut is finally happy. Please, please never stop making this product. It’s not just a soda to me. It’s now a daily ritual that has given me back comfort, confidence, and a feeling of being in control of my body again. Thank you, Culture Pop. I’m forever grateful. P.S. - This was not a paid review. Just an honest customer who only writes a review when it provokes a great emotional response 😭
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda, Pink Grapefruit & Ginger, Probiotic Low Sugar Soda, Sparkling Juice Alternative, Non-GMO, Kosher, Gluten-Free, No Stevia (Multipack, 12ct, 144 fl oz)

reviews.title: My favorite low sugar soda
reviews.body: I'm so glad I finally tried the grapefruit flavor. It's just the right amount of grapefruit flavor not too overpowering and the ginger really works with it
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda, Pink Grapefruit & Ginger, Probiotic Low Sugar Soda, Sparkling Juice Alternative, Non-GMO, Kosher, Gluten-Free, No Stevia (Multipack, 12ct, 144 fl oz)

reviews.title: I already drank half the case
reviews.body: I got it yesterday and I already drank half the 12 pack. It’s really tasty! I also like the carbonation. Someone asked me what I’m drinking because it looks so interesting. It says it’s slightly sweet which is accurate, it’s definitely not too sweet of a flavor and nothing artificial tasting. I would buy it again!

reviews.title: The best of all the probiotic sodas. Really fantastic.
reviews.body: By far the BEST of all the probiotic sodas, and I've tried most or all. Most ingredients are organic. They don't even promote this, but fruit is saturated in pesticides so if you want a pesticide free beverage, this. Best selection of flavors, ie, strawberry, black cherry, pink grapefruit, ginger, berry, etc. Every one delicious. Not overly fizzy. Nothing artificial. Just good all around. The best, no joke.
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda, Pink Grapefruit & Ginger, Probiotic Low Sugar Soda, Sparkling Juice Alternative, Non-GMO, Kosher, Gluten-Free, No Stevia (Multipack, 12ct, 144 fl oz)
